device_name: syngo.via MI WorkFlows, Scenium, syngo MBF
intended_use: An individual software program, or group of programs, routines, or algorithms that add specific image processing and/or analysis capabilities to a positron emission tomography (PET) and Single Photon
intended_use_full: An individual software program, or group of programs, routines, or algorithms that add specific image processing and/or analysis capabilities to a positron emission tomography (PET) and Single Photon Emission Computed Tomography (SPECT) imaging system configuration.
target_condition: oncology, cardiology, neurology, organ function disorders, dementia, movement disorders, seizure disorders
